title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (o), SUBPARAGRAPH 5, FOR THE PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE, PAGE 234, PARAGRAPHa, TITLE B, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY-THREE HUNDRED AND ONE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3702 / 57 OG No. 10, 1736 (March 6, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2848, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (

o

), SUBPARAGRAPH 5, FOR THE PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE, PAGE 234, PARAGRAPH

a

, TITLE B, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY-THREE HUNDRED AND ONE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION I. Item (

o

), subparagraph 5, for the Province of Antique, page 234, paragraph

a

, Title B, Section one of Republic Act Numbered Twenty-three hundred and one is hereby amended to read as follows:

"(

o

) For the asphalting of Felicidad and

Rizal streets, Dao -------------------- P10,000.00."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
